note: Regime A implemented: resident two-pass square->reduce(accumulate)->rsqrt->normalize(Col)[*gamma(Row)]. Testing single-tile first.

detail: 18/20 pass; 2 regime-B gamma-wide shapes route to stubbed B (NotImplementedError)
20/20 pass dev+non-dev, B stable over 3 repeats. mcast all-gather via Counter staging (avoids Flag self-set stale-flag on rotating sender), src==dst EXCLUDE_SRC trick + local-copy own slot.
Full grid-saturation heuristic: B when Ht_total<cores and rectangular K adds cores. 20/20 dev+non-dev x2. Routes K=8/16/32/64, layouts 8x1..8x8 + 2-band.

Two compounding bugs at cb_partial_sumsq cross-thread handshake. BUG1 (1/num_chunks): reader cb_wait_front(cb_partial_sumsq,1) returns after PASS-1 chunk0 push (count=1) and grabs that front L1 addr; reduce-accumulate pops/repushes across chunks landing the final sum in a DIFFERENT physical page, so reader mcasts only chunk0 partial = local/num_chunks. BUG2 (1/2): combine copy<gathered,partial_sumsq>+in-place add reads STALE PASS-1 local_sumsq as front because reader pops cb_partial_sumsq only after pushing gathered. Fix: dedicated cb_local_sumsq single-push handoff (compute->reader) after PASS-1 completes; combine writes into emptied cb_partial_sumsq.

Added cb_local_sumsq (CB28) single-push handoff. Compute Regime B: after PASS-1, copy<cb_partial_sumsq,cb_local_sumsq> (pops accumulator, pushes once after full accumulation), reader reads cb_local_sumsq, combine writes emptied cb_partial_sumsq. Wired CT args in reader_mcast + compute + descriptor (both regimes).
Regime B 8 shapes (nc=1,2,3; gamma off): all-ones mean=1.0000; random PCC=0.99999 relRMS 0.0035-0.0091. Bug fixed.
